rule.description: Endian UTM: Allowed OUTGOING traffic from $(srcip) to $(dstip):$(dstport) $(protocol).
Endian UTM: Dropped INCOMING traffic from $(srcip) to $(dstip):$(dstport) $(protocol).
Endian UTM: WARNING - Outgoing traffic allowed on high-risk port $(dstport) to $(dstip).
Endian UTM: New TCP connection initiated (SYN) from $(srcip) to $(dstip):$(dstport).
Endian UTM: TCP Connection reset (RST) from $(srcip) to $(dstip):$(dstport).
Endian UTM: ICMP Echo Request (Ping) from $(srcip) to $(dstip).
Endian UTM: ICMP Port Unreachable (Type 3 Code 3). Traffic from $(srcip) to $(dstip) was rejected.
Endian UTM: Web Proxy (Squid) allowed outbound connection to $(dstip):$(dstport).
Endian UTM: Firewall system (root/UID 0) initiated outbound connection to $(dstip):$(dstport).
Endian UTM: Large or fragmented UDP packet ($(endian_len) bytes) from $(srcip) to $(dstip).
